---
title: "Mapping"
author: "Connor Flynn"
date: "7/30/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(urbnmapr)
library(ggiraph)
options(scipen = 99)
```

```{r}
lang_data <- read_csv(here("LangAppData.csv"))
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)

lang_data_all_state <- lang_data %>%
  group_by(ST_label, LANP_label) %>%  # Group by state and language
  summarise(total_speakers = sum(n)) %>%  # Sum the speakers for each language within a state
  mutate(percent_speakers = (total_speakers / sum(total_speakers)) * 100)  # Calculate the percentage

# View the result
lang_data_all_state

```
```{r}
# Modify the ST_label to remove the state abbreviations
lang_data_all_state <- lang_data_all_state %>%
  mutate(ST_label = sub("/.*", "", ST_label))  # Remove anything after the '/'

```


```{r}
# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Language Speakers by State"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("selected_language", "Choose a Language:", 
                  choices = unique(lang_data_all_state$LANP_label))
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      ggiraphOutput("languageMap")
    )
  )
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output) {
  
  output$languageMap <- renderggiraph({
    # Filter data based on selected language
    filtered_data <- lang_data_all_state %>%
      filter(LANP_label == input$selected_language)
    
    # Join with urbnmapr data for state boundaries
    map_data <- left_join(get_urbn_map(map = "states"), filtered_data, by = c("state_name" = "ST_label"))
    
    # Create the map
    gg <- ggplot(map_data, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = percent_speakers)) +
      geom_polygon_interactive(aes(tooltip = paste(state_name, "\n", round(percent_speakers, 8), "%")), 
                               color = "white") +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", na.value = "grey90") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(fill = "% Speakers", title = paste("Percentage of", input$selected_language, "Speakers by State"))
    
    ggiraph(code = print(gg))
  })
}

# Run the Shiny app
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
















```{r}
# Define the UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Language Data Visualization"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("selected_language", "Select Language:", choices = unique(lang_data$LANP_label))
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("lang_plot")
    )
  )
)

# Define the server logic
server <- function(input, output) {
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    lang_data %>% 
      filter(LANP_label == input$selected_language)
  })
  
  output$lang_plot <- renderPlot({
    ggplot(filtered_data(), aes(x = ST_label, y = n, fill = AgeGroup)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
      labs(title = paste("Age Group Distribution by State for", input$selected_language),
           x = "State",
           y = "Count") +
      theme_minimal() +
      facet_wrap(~ ENG_label, nrow = 1) +
      coord_flip()  # Horizontal orientation
  })
}

# Run the application 
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

```


```{r}
# Define the UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Language Data Visualization"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("selected_language", "Select Language:", choices = unique(lang_data$LANP_label))
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("lang_plot"),
      plotOutput("lang_map")
    )
  )
)

# Define the server logic
server <- function(input, output) {
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    lang_data %>% 
      filter(LANP_label == input$selected_language)
  })
  
  output$lang_plot <- renderPlot({
    ggplot(filtered_data(), aes(x = ST_label, y = n, fill = AgeGroup)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
      labs(title = paste("Age Group Distribution by State for", input$selected_language),
           x = "State",
           y = "Count") +
      theme_minimal() +
      facet_wrap(~ ENG_label, nrow=1) +
      coord_flip()  # Horizontal orientation
  })
  
  output$lang_map <- renderPlot({
    states <- get_urbn_map(map = "states", sf = TRUE)
    state_abbr <- get_urbn_labels(map = "states") %>%
      rename(ST_label = state_name)
    
    filtered_states <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(ST_label, ENG_label) %>%
      summarize(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
      left_join(state_abbr, by = "ST_label") %>%
      left_join(states, by = c("ST_label" = "state_name"))
    
    ggplot(filtered_states) +
      geom_sf(data = states, fill = "white", color = "grey") +
      geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry, fill = n), color = "white") +
      facet_wrap(~ ENG_label) +
      scale_fill_viridis_c() +
      labs(title = paste("Map of", input$selected_language, "speakers by English Proficiency"),
           fill = "Count") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
}

# Run the application 
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

```
